candidate_summary: Null-space-LoRA forced into K=4 discrete overtone direction grid within null-space of fundamental-capability subspace + fixed orthogonal vzduchovod pre-projection P_vz voicing each update + alpine-long-range structural-bias training objective for cross-position attention beyond 1024 tokens.
content_words: overtone subspace null-space-LoRA orthogonal to fundamental-capability
discrete K-overtone direction grid 3-hole diatonic equivalent
vzduchovod fixed pre-projection P_vz voicing overtone structure

results.name: OPLoRA Orthogonal Projection
results.rationale: Near-identical mechanism: orthogonal-to-principal-subspace projection mirrors null-space-of-fundamental-capability subspace. Lacks K-discrete overtone grid + vzduchovod pre-projection.

results.name: SC-LoRA Subspace-Constrained
results.rationale: Subspace-constrained LoRA parallels null-space confinement with capability preservation; no K-overtone discretization.

results.name: CLoRA Predefined Subspace
results.rationale: Predefined subspace LoRA imposes orthogonality constraint; covers null-space-orthogonal core. Misses K=4 discrete grid + long-range structural-bias.

results.name: GORP Continual Gradient Low-Rank
results.rationale: Continual learning low-rank projection mechanistically analogous but continual-framed; no overtone discretization + no pre-projection voicing.

results.name: FILet Fisher Subspace LoRA
results.rationale: Fisher subspace LoRA identifies directions by Fisher importance; uses Fisher rather than null-space orthogonality.

results.name: Long-Context Sparse Attention Entmax
results.rationale: Sparse attention long-context efficiency tangentially overlaps long-range objective but no LoRA + no null-space.

results.name: DuoAttention Retrieval Streaming
results.rationale: Retrieval/streaming head separation partially relevant to long context but no null-space LoRA + no overtone grid.

results.name: Efficient Attention Survey
results.rationale: Survey of efficient attention mechanisms; no specific null-space LoRA + no overtone discretization.

decision_rationale: 3/8 prior-art hits (OPLoRA + SC-LoRA + CLoRA) at sem 0.70-0.78 / func 0.72-0.82 cover the null-space-orthogonal LoRA core. Per total_hits>=1 -> FAIL. Residual novelty in K-discrete overtone grid + vzduchovod pre-projection + alpine-long-range objective not jointly anticipated by any single prior art. Primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.72-0.90 / func 0.72-0.92; verifier and primary agree on FAIL though count diverges.
